content.text: All handbook revisions are logged here. This document is maintained for contractor reference and compliance purposes. Failure to read patch notes is not an acceptable excuse during audits.

content.label: MAJOR UPDATE
content.text: All 10 augment trees have been reworked with dual-branch architecture, giving each tree two distinct playstyles with shared T5 mastery capstones.

rows: Combo Counter (4 tiers), Movement Momentum (4 tiers), 24 augments, 17 abilities
Wrath Escalation Tracker (damage-taken triggers), Carnage kill chains, 26 augments, 17 abilities
Burn & Bleed loop, Furnace self-buffs, Parasite venting, Toxicity thresholds, 22 augments, 17 abilities
Guardian ally protection, Juggernaut punish-on-hit, Tower Shield added to kit gear, 24 augments, 17 abilities
Conduit single-target focus, Storm AoE blasting, pattern synergies, 24 augments, 17 abilities
Grenadier throwable specialization, Trapper deployable field control, 24 augments, 17 abilities
Martyr absorb/heal tank, Vessel DoT/redirect, 24 augments, 17 abilities
Commander ally buffs, Provocateur enemy debuffs, 24 augments, 17 abilities
Marksman stationary power, Gunslinger hit escalation, 24 augments, 17 abilities
Assassin burst damage, Pinball momentum chains, Sprint Actuators reworked, 24 augments, 17 abilities
Integrated across 5 combat pages — basics, attacks, positioning, special actions, and advanced rules
Added throwable weapon rules, AoE templates, dodge rolls, knockback, condition interactions
Added Finesse tag to light melee weapons, on-hit effects to all weapon categories
Added mace, hafted weapon category, and reach mechanics
Targets resist with Chrome or Edge; escape requires Chrome check
Added unarmed combat rules and Brawler kit variant
Full rewrite with proper tables, rebalanced pricing, new consumable items added
Converted all ASCII tables to proper structured data, rebalanced service costs
Added Tower Shield, updated shield mechanics for Fortress rework
Mixed-species family biology, childhood in the corporate world
Species arrival order corrected — Grunts confirmed as first non-human species on Earth
Community structures, cultural practices, inter-species relations
Key NPCs, corporate executives, faction leaders
The Mirror relocated here, urban legends, corporate myths
Inter-corp relations, power dynamics, cold wars
Fallen corporations — dead brands as dead religions
What life actually looks like for regular people
How society adapted to the new world
All 10 kits now have branched ability pages nested under their augment trees
Fixed formatting, converted ASCII art to proper table structures
Updated resume options, fixed formatting issues
Redesigned tabs with proper styling, updated all T1 augment costs to match reworks
Expanded dimension entries with proper structured data
New speculative dimensions for GM use
Random encounter and discovery tables for rift expeditions
New content types, callout boxes, ability cards, dice badges, page transitions
Collapsible sections, 'On This Page' sub-navigation for headings
Full-text search across all handbook pages
Added .nojekyll, fixed blank page loading issues
Manifest and page fetches now bypass browser cache
Converted all remaining ASCII/dashed-line pseudo-tables to structured JSON tables

content.text: All systems are subject to change during the playtest period. If something feels broken, it probably is. File a complaint with your Broker.
